covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly COVID-19 case counts and healthcare visit data from AZDHS Power BI dashboard
covid_surveillance.long_description: Arizona Department of Health Services collects and reports COVID-19 surveillance data weekly via Power BI dashboard. Data covers laboratory-confirmed case counts (statewide, by county, and by age group) and ED/inpatient visit percentages.

influenza_surveillance.short_description: Weekly influenza case counts, type/subtype breakdown, and healthcare visit data from AZDHS Power BI dashboard
influenza_surveillance.long_description: Arizona Department of Health Services collects and reports influenza surveillance data weekly via Power BI dashboard. Data covers laboratory-confirmed case counts (statewide, by county, by age group, and by type/subtype) and ED/inpatient visit percentages.

rsv_surveillance.short_description: Weekly RSV case counts and healthcare visit data from AZDHS Power BI dashboard
rsv_surveillance.long_description: Arizona Department of Health Services collects and reports RSV surveillance data weekly via Power BI dashboard. Data covers laboratory-confirmed case counts (statewide, by county, and by age group) and ED/inpatient visit percentages.

ari_surveillance.short_description: Weekly acute respiratory illness ED and inpatient visit percentages from AZDHS ESSENCE system
ari_surveillance.long_description: Arizona Department of Health Services reports aggregate ARI (acute respiratory illness) healthcare visit percentages weekly via the ESSENCE syndromic surveillance system. Includes ED and inpatient visit percentages.

mortality_surveillance.short_description: Weekly respiratory mortality counts by cause from AZDHS Power BI dashboard
mortality_surveillance.long_description: Arizona Department of Health Services reports weekly respiratory-related death counts by cause (COVID-19, influenza, pneumonia, etc.) and season via Power BI dashboard.

az_dph.name: Arizona Department of Health Services
az_dph.description: Arizona Department of Health Services provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Arizona via a public Power BI dashboard. Data covers case counts (COVID-19, influenza, RSV) by geography, age, and type; healthcare visit percentages (ED and inpatient); and mortality. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state and county level.
az_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
